claim_text: http:// deps are refused unless --allow-insecure or --allow-insecure-host HOSTNAME is passed.

evidence.snippet: help="Install APM and MCP dependencies (supports APM packages, Claude skills (SKILL.md), and plugin collections (plugin.json); auto-creates apm.yml; use --allow-insecure for http:// packages)"
help="Allow HTTP (insecure) dependencies. Required when dependencies use http:// URLs.",
"MCP registry URL (http:// or https://) for resolving --mcp NAME. "
apm install --allow-insecure http://...  # HTTP URL (needs allow_insecure)
f"supported; use http:// or https://. WebSocket URLs (ws/wss) "
